title: Public archive monitor for A733 SDMMC0 maintainer question
question: Has the plain-text resend appeared in public archives or produced a public reply that changes the blocker?

searches.query: "sunxi-mmc: A733 IDMAC stuck in descriptor rea"
searches.result: No matching public archive copy found.

searches.result: No matching public archive copy found.

decision: No patch and no resend. Public archives do not yet expose a reply or clue. Continue monitoring without changing the kernel tree.
next_responsible_step: Wait for list/maintainer/vendor response or newly found source evidence before building another IDMAC behavior patch.
